question.label: Current stretch
question.name: What part of your work is stretching you the most right now?
question.description: Identifies areas where Priya is experiencing growth or challenge.

answer: Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.

assessment.note: Priya is not experiencing significant stretch; context-switching is manageable but accumulative.

new_queue.name: What kind of support do you need from me as new projects start to come into view?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
